description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python Package Linux that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest with Python versions 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11. For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies, check code formatting with black, and run tests with pytest.
